message:
polish(tldr): enhance visual feedback and micro-interactions

Improve the TLDR tool card component with subtle visual enhancements:

- Add ring styling to SynergyPill for better affordance on hover
- Add transition-colors to synergy description text
- Add motion-safe hover scale (1.01x) and glow shadow effect
- Use CSS variable for dynamic accent-colored shadow
- Add subtle pop animation to GitHub stars badge on mount
- Add translate effect to external link icon on hover

All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion via motion-safe utility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
